findings.summary: ESP32-S2 development board with PCB antenna, USB, LEDs. Antenna A1 misclassified as IC via A-prefix; complementary BJT U11 ZDT6790TA classified as IC despite BJT in lib_id.

incorrect.description: A1 (PCB antenna, Device:R, value='ANT', 1206 footprint) classified as IC due to 'A' ref prefix -- should be antenna
U11 ZDT6790TA with lib_id 'cnhardware:ZDT6790-COMPLEMENTARY-BJT' classified as IC -- 'BJT' in lib_id should override U prefix

suggestions: Ref prefix 'A' should map to antenna, not IC
Lib_id containing 'BJT' should override IC classification from U prefix
